description: Solve the 'Wolf, Goat, and Cabbage' logic activity in GCompris by transporting the Wolf, Goat, and Cabbage to the opposite river bank without leaving incompatible pairs (Wolf/Goat or Goat/Cabbage) unattended. Document the process with two screenshots: an intermediate state where the Goat is alone on the Right bank and the Boat has returned to the Left bank (saved to ~/Documents/river_mid_step.png), and the final solved state with all items on the Right bank (saved to ~/Documents/river_solved.png).
